title: coelocline lucida
intro: Coelocline lucida, also known as the shining daisy or false daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coelocline lucida include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Coelocline lucida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
